1 0.60084258 1196799 CC(C)NC(=O)CCc1ccccc1

3 0.055862159 55132 CON=C1C2CCC(C2)C12CC=CC2

8 0.00063278465 55134 CC(C)C1(C)CC(=N)c2occc2C1
9 0.00025960861 55136 CCOC(=O)C(CN)CC(C)(C)F
10 5.6185819e-05 55135 OC12CNCC1CCC1=CCCC=C12
